heading: Today
text: Mostly sunny, mixing with some clouds northeast in the afternoon.  Continued cool.  Highs in the low to mid 50s north, 50s to near 60 in the Champlain Valley and south.  Winds becoming northwest near 10 mph from the Green Mountains east, lighter to the west.

heading: Tonight
text: Clear early, then increasing clouds from west to east.  Lows in the 30s to near 40, near 32 in the colder spots east.  Winds becoming light east of the Green Mountains, turning to the south 10 to 15 mph from the Green Mountains west.

heading: Wednesday
text: Any early sun from the Green Mountains east giving way to clouds.  Showers developing through NY in the morning, reaching the Green Mountains by midday, spreading east in the afternoon.  Highs in the 50s to near 60, falling during the rain showers.  Winds increasing from the south 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.
